example: My colleague always helps me finish reports on time.
exampleCn: 我的同事总是帮我按时完成报告。

example: Most folk in this village still farm for a living.
exampleCn: 这个村子里的大多数人仍然以务农为生。

example: The legal system is too complex for ordinary people to understand.
exampleCn: 法律体系太复杂，普通人难以理解。

example: It is impossible to finish this project in one day.
exampleCn: 一天之内完成这个项目是不可能的。

example: Please turn off the music so I can concentrate on studying.
exampleCn: 请把音乐关掉，好让我专心学习。

example: She answered every question with great confidence.
exampleCn: 她非常自信地回答了每一个问题。

example: Can you help me lift this heavy box upstairs?
exampleCn: 你能帮我把这个重箱子抬上楼吗？

example: Our customers are mainly young people from big cities.
exampleCn: 我们的顾客主要是来自大城市的年轻人。

example: They crossed the border into France early this morning.
exampleCn: 他们今天清晨越过边境进入法国。

example: Villagers gather in the square every evening to chat.
exampleCn: 村民们每天傍晚聚集在广场上聊天。

example: There is a strict limit on luggage weight for this flight.
exampleCn: 这趟航班对行李重量有严格的限制。

example: A golden cross hung on the church wall.
exampleCn: 教堂的墙上挂着一个金色的十字架。

example: Every visitor must sign in at the front desk.
exampleCn: 每位访客都必须在前台登记。

example: The famous critic praised the young director's new film.
exampleCn: 这位著名评论家称赞了年轻导演的新电影。

example: He made a commitment to support the charity every year.
exampleCn: 他承诺每年资助这个慈善机构。

example: Two plus three equals five, as every child knows.
exampleCn: 二加三等于五，这是每个孩子都知道的。

example: The library keeps every volume of this rare encyclopedia.
exampleCn: 图书馆收藏了这套珍稀百科全书的每一卷。

example: I insist that you stay for dinner tonight.
exampleCn: 我坚持要你今晚留下来吃晚饭。

example: The new legislation will protect workers from unfair dismissal.
exampleCn: 新的立法将保护工人免遭不公平解雇。

example: She greeted the guests in a friendly manner.
exampleCn: 她以友好的态度迎接客人。

example: He comes from a very humble family background.
exampleCn: 他出身于非常普通的家庭背景。

example: Birds can spread seeds over long distances.
exampleCn: 鸟类能把种子传播到很远的地方。

example: Each entry in the dictionary explains one word clearly.
exampleCn: 词典里的每个条目都清楚地解释一个单词。

example: We watched a baseball game at the stadium last night.
exampleCn: 我们昨晚在体育场看了一场棒球比赛。

example: This pillow is so soft that I fall asleep quickly.
exampleCn: 这个枕头特别软，我很快就睡着了。

example: The mechanic checked the car engine carefully before the trip.
exampleCn: 出发前，修理工仔细检查了汽车发动机。

example: She keeps all her medicine in the kitchen cabinet.
exampleCn: 她把所有的药都放在厨房的橱柜里。

example: Let me demonstrate how this machine works.
exampleCn: 让我来示范一下这台机器是如何工作的。

example: The book begins with a short introduction to its main themes.
exampleCn: 这本书以对主要主题的简短介绍开篇。

example: She previously worked as a nurse in London.
exampleCn: 她以前在伦敦当过护士。

example: The police are still investigating the murder case.
exampleCn: 警方仍在调查这起谋杀案。

example: Domestic flights are usually cheaper than international ones.
exampleCn: 国内航班通常比国际航班便宜。

example: People should be free to practice any religion they choose.
exampleCn: 人们应该有自由信仰自己选择的宗教。

example: The editor asked me to shorten my article.
exampleCn: 编辑让我把文章缩短一些。

example: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
exampleCn: 早上我更喜欢喝茶而不是咖啡。

example: Good teachers engage students in lively classroom discussion.
exampleCn: 好老师能让学生投入到活跃的课堂讨论中。

example: It was just an ordinary day until the phone rang.
exampleCn: 那本是平常的一天，直到电话铃响起。

example: The exam was extremely difficult for most students.
exampleCn: 这次考试对大多数学生来说极其困难。

example: Rising sea levels threaten many coastal cities.
exampleCn: 不断上升的海平面威胁着许多沿海城市。

example: She sighed with relief when her son finally called.
exampleCn: 儿子终于来电话时，她如释重负地松了口气。

example: He swore he would never commit such a crime.
exampleCn: 他发誓绝不会犯下这样的罪行。

example: The manual is full of technical terms I cannot understand.
exampleCn: 这本手册里满是我看不懂的专业术语。

example: The university will grant him a full scholarship next year.
exampleCn: 大学明年将授予他全额奖学金。

example: The actual cost was much higher than we expected.
exampleCn: 实际花费比我们预期的高得多。

example: The female lion does most of the hunting.
exampleCn: 母狮承担了大部分的捕猎工作。

example: He spent his youth in a small fishing village.
exampleCn: 他在一个小渔村度过了青年时代。

example: A huge wave knocked the surfer off his board.
exampleCn: 一个巨浪把冲浪者打下了冲浪板。

example: Could you repeat the question more slowly, please?
exampleCn: 你能再慢一点重复一下这个问题吗？

example: The new regulation requires all drivers to wear seat belts.
exampleCn: 新规定要求所有司机系好安全带。

example: As a native of Beijing, she knows every old street.
exampleCn: 作为北京本地人，她熟悉每一条老街。

example: His weekly wage barely covers the family's food expenses.
exampleCn: 他一周的工资勉强够支付家里的伙食费。

example: The river is too broad to swim across.
exampleCn: 这条河太宽了，游不过去。

example: We had a wonderful time at the beach yesterday.
exampleCn: 我们昨天在海滩玩得非常开心。

example: We sat in the front row of the theater.
exampleCn: 我们坐在剧院的前排。

example: Children acquire language skills at an amazing speed.
exampleCn: 孩子们以惊人的速度习得语言技能。

example: He wore his best suit to the job interview.
exampleCn: 他穿着自己最好的西装去参加求职面试。

example: Travel gives you a new perspective on your own culture.
exampleCn: 旅行让你以全新的视角看待自己的文化。

example: The test was fairly easy, so everyone passed.
exampleCn: 这次测验相当容易，所以大家都通过了。

example: The new bridge is still under construction.
exampleCn: 新桥仍在施工建设中。

example: Her excellent grades earned her a place at Oxford.
exampleCn: 她优异的成绩让她获得了牛津大学的录取。

example: Dolphins show remarkable intelligence in solving problems.
exampleCn: 海豚在解决问题时表现出非凡的智力。

example: A single fire can destroy an entire forest.
exampleCn: 一场大火就能毁掉整片森林。

example: The company is conducting an internal investigation into the matter.
exampleCn: 公司正在对此事进行内部调查。

example: We took a guided tour of the ancient castle.
exampleCn: 我们参加了古堡的导览观光。

example: There is a close connection between diet and health.
exampleCn: 饮食与健康之间有着密切的联系。

example: Be careful not to burn the toast again.
exampleCn: 小心别再把吐司烤糊了。

example: Heavy traffic made us late for the meeting.
exampleCn: 交通拥堵让我们开会迟到了。

example: The art exhibition attracted thousands of visitors last weekend.
exampleCn: 上周末的艺术展览吸引了数千名参观者。

example: The company will launch its new phone next month.
exampleCn: 这家公司下个月将发布新款手机。

example: She wrote her name on a blank sheet of paper.
exampleCn: 她在一张白纸上写下了自己的名字。

example: The hotel's location is perfect for visiting the old town.
exampleCn: 这家酒店的位置非常适合游览老城区。

example: His sudden appearance at the party surprised everyone.
exampleCn: 他在聚会上的突然现身让所有人都很吃惊。

example: Indian food is famous for its rich spices.
exampleCn: 印度菜以丰富的香料而闻名。

example: He made a promise to call his mother every week.
exampleCn: 他许下诺言，每周都给母亲打电话。

example: There has been a great improvement in her English.
exampleCn: 她的英语有了很大的进步。

example: The witness gave a detailed description of the thief.
exampleCn: 目击者对小偷的特征做了详细的描述。

example: The dog buried a bone in the garden.
exampleCn: 狗把一根骨头埋在了花园里。

example: The training session lasted three hours this morning.
exampleCn: 今天上午的培训课持续了三个小时。

example: Winters in the northern part of the country are very cold.
exampleCn: 这个国家北部的冬天非常寒冷。

example: The land here is flat and good for farming.
exampleCn: 这里地势平坦，很适合耕种。

example: We should combine theory with practice in our study.
exampleCn: 我们在学习中应当把理论与实践结合起来。

example: Strict discipline helps soldiers stay calm under pressure.
exampleCn: 严格的纪律帮助士兵在压力下保持镇定。

example: The contrast between the rich and poor areas is striking.
exampleCn: 富人区和穷人区之间的反差十分鲜明。

example: She bit her lip to keep from laughing.
exampleCn: 她咬住嘴唇忍住不笑出来。

example: People are increasingly worried about climate change.
exampleCn: 人们越来越担心气候变化。

example: Scientists still question the existence of life on Mars.
exampleCn: 科学家们仍在质疑火星上是否存在生命。

example: Online learning has become popular among working adults.
exampleCn: 在线学习在上班族中变得很流行。

example: A true gentleman always keeps his word.
exampleCn: 真正的绅士总是信守诺言。

example: The soldiers went through hell during the long war.
exampleCn: 在漫长的战争中，士兵们经历了地狱般的苦难。

example: The charity oversees the distribution of food to refugees.
exampleCn: 该慈善机构负责向难民分发食品。

example: Swimming alone in this river is very dangerous.
exampleCn: 独自在这条河里游泳非常危险。

example: Wear proper clothes for the formal dinner tonight.
exampleCn: 今晚的正式晚宴要穿合适得体的衣服。

example: Please remind me to take my medicine after lunch.
exampleCn: 请提醒我午饭后吃药。

example: The story teaches a simple moral about honesty.
exampleCn: 这个故事讲述了一个关于诚实的简单寓意。

example: This material can retain heat for many hours.
exampleCn: 这种材料能够保温好几个小时。

example: The team celebrated their victory with the cheering fans.
exampleCn: 球队和欢呼的球迷们一起庆祝胜利。

example: Her academic research focuses on ancient Chinese history.
exampleCn: 她的学术研究专注于中国古代史。

example: The young prince will inherit the throne someday.
exampleCn: 这位年轻的王子总有一天会继承王位。

example: They took out a loan to buy their first house.
exampleCn: 他们贷款买下了第一套房子。

example: Enter the security code to unlock the door.
exampleCn: 输入安全密码即可打开这扇门。

example: His negative attitude affects the whole team.
exampleCn: 他消极的态度影响了整个团队。

example: Each class sends one representative to the student council.
exampleCn: 每个班级派一名代表参加学生会。

example: The museum displays historical documents from the Tang dynasty.
exampleCn: 博物馆展出唐代的历史文献。

example: She arrived at the office earlier than usual today.
exampleCn: 她今天比平时更早到达办公室。

example: He was unable to attend the meeting because of illness.
exampleCn: 他因病无法出席会议。

example: These books belong to the school library.
exampleCn: 这些书属于学校图书馆。

example: The study's main finding surprised many medical experts.
exampleCn: 这项研究的主要发现让许多医学专家感到惊讶。

example: Students should show respect for their teachers.
exampleCn: 学生应该对老师表示尊敬。

example: Bright flowers attract bees and butterflies in spring.
exampleCn: 春天，鲜艳的花朵吸引着蜜蜂和蝴蝶。

example: We have a limited budget for this project.
exampleCn: 我们这个项目的预算很有限。

example: She keeps an old photograph of her grandparents on the desk.
exampleCn: 她在书桌上放着一张祖父母的旧照片。

example: You need formal dress for the wedding ceremony.
exampleCn: 参加婚礼仪式需要穿正式的服装。

example: All students are encouraged to participate in the discussion.
exampleCn: 鼓励所有学生参与到讨论中来。

example: Walking is part of my daily routine.
exampleCn: 散步是我日常生活的一部分。

example: Her writing is clear, simple, and full of warmth.
exampleCn: 她的文字清晰简洁，充满温情。

example: The company decided to reject his job application.
exampleCn: 公司决定拒绝他的求职申请。

example: He hurt his knee while playing football yesterday.
exampleCn: 他昨天踢足球时伤了膝盖。

example: Teachers assess student progress through tests and homework.
exampleCn: 老师通过测验和作业来评估学生的进步。

example: The cold weather makes my knee joint ache.
exampleCn: 寒冷的天气让我的膝关节疼痛。

example: She found an old tape of her grandmother singing.
exampleCn: 她找到了一盘祖母唱歌的旧录音带。

example: After thirty years of work, he lives on his pension.
exampleCn: 工作三十年后，他靠养老金生活。

example: We need to hire two more waiters for the summer.
exampleCn: 我们需要再雇两名服务员来应对夏季。

example: Her face looks familiar, but I forget her name.
exampleCn: 她的面孔看起来很熟悉，但我忘了她的名字。

example: The teacher gave a clear explanation of the grammar rule.
exampleCn: 老师对这条语法规则做了清楚的解释。

example: Our meals mainly consist of rice and fresh vegetables.
exampleCn: 我们的三餐主要由米饭和新鲜蔬菜组成。

example: The young actor won an award for his first film.
exampleCn: 这位年轻男演员凭借首部电影获了奖。

example: His conservative views often clash with younger colleagues.
exampleCn: 他保守的观点常常与年轻同事产生分歧。

example: She gave birth to a healthy baby girl last night.
exampleCn: 她昨晚生下了一个健康的女婴。

example: The police continued their search for the missing child.
exampleCn: 警方继续搜寻失踪的孩子。

example: He wore a blue tie to match his shirt.
exampleCn: 他系了一条蓝色领带来搭配衬衫。

example: Let's invite our neighbors over for dinner this weekend.
exampleCn: 这个周末我们邀请邻居来吃晚饭吧。

example: In a democracy, every citizen has the right to vote.
exampleCn: 在民主政体中，每个公民都有投票权。

example: The sun rises over the eastern mountains every morning.
exampleCn: 每天清晨，太阳从东边的群山上升起。

example: The children sat in a circle around the teacher.
exampleCn: 孩子们围着老师坐成一圈。

example: This small device can measure your heart rate accurately.
exampleCn: 这个小装置能精确测量你的心率。

example: The stadium has a seating capacity of eighty thousand.
exampleCn: 这座体育场可容纳八万名观众。

example: Prices vary greatly from one city to another.
exampleCn: 价格因城市不同而差别很大。

example: The keys sank to the bottom of the lake.
exampleCn: 钥匙沉到了湖底。

example: The store offers a wide selection of fresh fruit.
exampleCn: 这家商店提供种类丰富的新鲜水果可供挑选。

example: Doctors warn that smoking seriously damages your health.
exampleCn: 医生警告说，吸烟会严重损害健康。

example: She studied finance at university and now works in banking.
exampleCn: 她在大学学习金融，现在从事银行业工作。

example: Surely you don't believe everything you read online?
exampleCn: 你肯定不会相信网上看到的一切吧？

example: The government plans to impose a new tax on sugar.
exampleCn: 政府计划对糖征收一项新税。

example: Life in rural areas is quieter than in big cities.
exampleCn: 乡村地区的生活比大城市安静。

example: Doctors suggest eating lean meat instead of fatty pork.
exampleCn: 医生建议吃瘦肉，而不是肥猪肉。

example: The giraffe's long neck helps it reach high leaves.
exampleCn: 长颈鹿的长脖子帮助它够到高处的树叶。

example: Plastic bags cause serious pollution in the ocean.
exampleCn: 塑料袋对海洋造成了严重污染。

example: I have no intention of selling the old house.
exampleCn: 我无意出售这栋老房子。

example: He is very quiet, whereas his brother talks all day.
exampleCn: 他很安静，而他的兄弟整天说个不停。

example: My initial plan was to travel alone this summer.
exampleCn: 我最初的计划是今年夏天独自旅行。

example: I hate getting up early on cold winter mornings.
exampleCn: 我讨厌在寒冷的冬日清晨早起。

example: She passed the final examination with the highest score.
exampleCn: 她以最高分通过了期末考试。

example: Luckily, everyone in the crash was still alive.
exampleCn: 幸运的是，事故中的所有人都还活着。

example: The dictionary gives a clear definition of each word.
exampleCn: 这本词典对每个单词都给出了清晰的定义。

example: The mayor will declare the new park open tomorrow.
exampleCn: 市长明天将宣布新公园正式开放。

example: The company made a substantial profit last year.
exampleCn: 这家公司去年获得了相当可观的利润。

example: Mom cooked chicken soup for dinner tonight.
exampleCn: 妈妈今晚做了鸡汤当晚餐。

example: The aircraft landed safely despite the heavy storm.
exampleCn: 尽管风暴猛烈，飞机还是安全着陆了。

example: Drug abuse remains a serious problem in many cities.
exampleCn: 滥用毒品在许多城市仍然是个严重问题。

example: The factory doubled its output of cars this year.
exampleCn: 这家工厂今年的汽车产量翻了一番。

example: Please shut the window before you leave the room.
exampleCn: 离开房间前请把窗户关上。

example: This film is not suitable for young children.
exampleCn: 这部电影不适合幼儿观看。

example: The injured patient needs immediate medical attention.
exampleCn: 这位受伤的病人需要立即接受治疗。

example: Let's divide the cake into eight equal pieces.
exampleCn: 我们把蛋糕分成八等份吧。

example: You ought to apologize to her for being rude.
exampleCn: 你应该为自己的无礼向她道歉。

example: All people are equal before the law.
exampleCn: 法律面前人人平等。

example: She loves reading classical English literature in her free time.
exampleCn: 她喜欢在闲暇时阅读英国古典文学。

example: The restaurant serves good food at a reasonable price.
exampleCn: 这家餐厅菜品不错，价格也合理。

example: He has a strong desire to see the world.
exampleCn: 他有着想去看看世界的强烈愿望。

example: He is a leading expert in heart surgery.
exampleCn: 他是心脏外科领域的顶尖专家。

example: The store announced a big reduction in winter coat prices.
exampleCn: 这家商店宣布冬季大衣大幅降价。

example: We bought white paint to refresh the bedroom walls.
exampleCn: 我们买了白色油漆来翻新卧室的墙壁。

example: She gave a quick nod to show her agreement.
exampleCn: 她快速点了点头表示同意。

example: The plane carries enough fuel for ten hours of flight.
exampleCn: 这架飞机携带的燃料足够飞行十个小时。

example: I have a dental appointment at three this afternoon.
exampleCn: 我今天下午三点约了看牙医。

example: A yellow leaf fell slowly from the old tree.
exampleCn: 一片黄叶从老树上缓缓飘落。

example: Follow each instruction carefully when installing the software.
exampleCn: 安装软件时请仔细遵循每一条指令。

example: Chess requires deep concentration and careful planning.
exampleCn: 下棋需要高度的专注和周密的计划。

example: The kids spent the whole afternoon in the swimming pool.
exampleCn: 孩子们整个下午都泡在游泳池里。

example: The overall quality of the products has improved greatly.
exampleCn: 产品的整体质量有了很大提高。

example: We plan to climb the mountain before sunrise.
exampleCn: 我们计划在日出前爬上这座山。

example: Add a little salt to make the soup tastier.
exampleCn: 加一点盐让汤更鲜美。

example: The company plans to expand its business into Asia.
exampleCn: 这家公司计划把业务扩展到亚洲。

example: This bridge is made of strong metal and concrete.
exampleCn: 这座桥由坚固的金属和混凝土建成。

example: Many species may disappear if we destroy their habitats.
exampleCn: 如果我们破坏栖息地，许多物种可能会消失。

example: I recommend this novel to anyone who loves history.
exampleCn: 我向所有喜欢历史的人推荐这部小说。

example: Please check whether all the answers are correct.
exampleCn: 请检查一下所有答案是否正确。

example: Reading before bed helps me relax after a long day.
exampleCn: 睡前阅读帮助我在漫长的一天后放松下来。

example: Make sure you have sufficient time to finish the test.
exampleCn: 要确保你有足够的时间完成测验。

example: Urban life offers more jobs but less fresh air.
exampleCn: 都市生活提供更多工作机会，却少了新鲜空气。

example: Regular exercise is good for your mental health.
exampleCn: 经常锻炼有益于心理健康。

example: Her long absence from school worried all her teachers.
exampleCn: 她长期缺课让所有老师都很担心。

example: The new policy received sharp criticism from the public.
exampleCn: 新政策受到了公众的尖锐批评。

example: She devoted her whole life to teaching in rural schools.
exampleCn: 她把一生都奉献给了乡村学校的教学。

example: Mars is the fourth planet from the sun.
exampleCn: 火星是距离太阳第四近的行星。

example: Chocolate ice cream is my favorite dessert in summer.
exampleCn: 巧克力冰淇淋是我夏天最喜欢的甜点。

example: He requested a transfer to the company's Shanghai office.
exampleCn: 他申请调到公司的上海办事处。

example: The children love to explore the woods behind their house.
exampleCn: 孩子们喜欢去屋后的树林里探险。

example: A small error in the code crashed the whole system.
exampleCn: 代码中的一个小错误导致整个系统崩溃。

example: The army defeated the enemy after a long battle.
exampleCn: 经过长时间的战斗，军队击败了敌人。

example: Workers completed the assembly of the new engine ahead of schedule.
exampleCn: 工人们提前完成了新发动机的装配。

example: Lemon juice contains a lot of natural acid.
exampleCn: 柠檬汁含有大量天然的酸。

example: Tall trees surround the quiet little lake.
exampleCn: 高大的树木环绕着这个宁静的小湖。

example: The young athlete trains six hours every day.
exampleCn: 这位年轻运动员每天训练六个小时。

example: The two companies finally reached a settlement out of court.
exampleCn: 两家公司最终达成了庭外和解。

example: There is no scientific evidence to support that claim.
exampleCn: 没有科学证据支持那种说法。

example: Music can touch the deepest part of the human soul.
exampleCn: 音乐能触动人类灵魂的最深处。

example: We are ready to undertake this difficult task together.
exampleCn: 我们准备一起承担这项艰巨的任务。

example: A panel of experts will judge the cooking contest.
exampleCn: 一个专家小组将评判这场烹饪比赛。

example: The married couple moved into their new home last week.
exampleCn: 这对已婚夫妇上周搬进了新家。

example: Scientists use this instrument to measure tiny temperature changes.
exampleCn: 科学家用这台仪器测量微小的温度变化。

example: She listened to music whilst doing her homework.
exampleCn: 她一边做作业，一边听音乐。

example: Scientists cannot predict exactly when an earthquake will happen.
exampleCn: 科学家无法准确预测地震何时发生。

example: Please select the answer that best fits the question.
exampleCn: 请选出最符合题意的答案。

example: Switch to another channel; this show is boring.
exampleCn: 换个频道吧，这个节目太无聊了。

example: The farewell speech was an emotional moment for everyone.
exampleCn: 那场告别演讲对每个人来说都是动情的时刻。

example: The museum charges a small entrance fee for adults.
exampleCn: 博物馆向成年人收取少量门票费。

example: The supreme court will announce its decision tomorrow.
exampleCn: 最高法院明天将宣布其裁决。

example: He put the keys in his coat pocket.
exampleCn: 他把钥匙放进了大衣口袋。

example: The temperature dropped below zero last night.
exampleCn: 昨晚气温降到了零度以下。

example: The latest poll shows the mayor losing public support.
exampleCn: 最新民调显示市长正在失去公众支持。

example: Don't waste food when so many people are hungry.
exampleCn: 还有那么多人在挨饿，不要浪费食物。

example: He frequently travels to Japan for business.
exampleCn: 他经常去日本出差。

example: The implication of his words was that we should leave.
exampleCn: 他话中的言外之意是我们该走了。

example: Take a deep breath before you start your speech.
exampleCn: 开始演讲之前先深吸一口气。

example: Her hard work finally earned her international recognition.
exampleCn: 她的努力终于为她赢得了国际赞誉。

example: She works as a researcher at a medical institute.
exampleCn: 她在一家医学研究所担任研究员。

example: Each component of the engine must be tested carefully.
exampleCn: 发动机的每个部件都必须经过仔细检测。

example: France became a republic after the revolution.
exampleCn: 大革命之后，法国成为了共和国。

example: Only a small minority of students voted against the plan.
exampleCn: 只有少数学生投票反对这项计划。

example: You should seriously consider his advice before deciding.
exampleCn: 做决定之前，你应该认真考虑他的建议。

example: Make sure the door is properly locked before leaving.
exampleCn: 离开前要确保门已妥善锁好。

example: This bridge will connect the island to the mainland.
exampleCn: 这座桥将把岛屿与大陆连接起来。

example: It is unlikely that the meeting will finish on time.
exampleCn: 会议不太可能按时结束。

example: The accident was partly caused by the icy road.
exampleCn: 这起事故部分是由结冰的路面造成的。

example: The shop was closed, so we went elsewhere for coffee.
exampleCn: 那家店关门了，所以我们去别处喝咖啡。

example: Expensive products are not necessarily better than cheap ones.
exampleCn: 贵的产品不一定就比便宜的好。

example: She helped organize a charity concert for the local hospital.
exampleCn: 她帮忙为当地医院组织了一场慈善音乐会。

example: Nearly every household in town owns at least one car.
exampleCn: 镇上几乎每户人家至少拥有一辆汽车。

example: The guide showed us around the ancient temple.
exampleCn: 导游带我们参观了这座古庙。

example: The hunters followed the trail of the deer through the snow.
exampleCn: 猎人们沿着鹿留在雪地里的踪迹追踪。

example: I stayed up all night reading that exciting novel.
exampleCn: 我熬了一整夜读那本精彩的小说。

example: Somehow she always knows when I am feeling sad.
exampleCn: 不知为何，她总能知道我什么时候难过。

example: The jury found the defendant not guilty.
exampleCn: 陪审团裁定被告无罪。

example: The students did a simple experiment with water and salt.
exampleCn: 学生们用水和盐做了一个简单的实验。

example: She held the sleeping baby gently against her breast.
exampleCn: 她把熟睡的婴儿轻轻地抱在胸前。

example: A sudden silence fell over the noisy classroom.
exampleCn: 嘈杂的教室突然安静了下来。

example: Children feel secure when their parents are nearby.
exampleCn: 父母在身边时，孩子们会感到安心。

example: You should acknowledge your mistakes and learn from them.
exampleCn: 你应该承认自己的错误并从中吸取教训。

example: My grandfather retired at the age of sixty.
exampleCn: 我的祖父在六十岁时退休了。
